title: One person injured after falling from Big Blu upper deck
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  One person fell over...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  One person fell over the upper deck of the Big Blu Restaurant at The Point yesterday, 23 December.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - One person fell over the upper deck of the Big Blu Restaurant at The Point yesterday, 23 December."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Mossel Bay Municipality has confirmed that emergency medical services responded to the scene and treated the individual, who is believed to female, for injuries sustained."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The circumstances of the incident and the extent of the injuries sustained are not yet known.","html":"The circumstances of the incident and the extent of the injuries sustained are not yet known."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mossel Bay Advertiser has sent an inquiry to the Western Cape Department of Health and will update readers once more information becomes available.","html":"Mossel Bay Advertiser has sent an inquiry to the Western Cape Department of Health and will update readers once more information becomes available."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: One person injured after falling from Big Blu upper deck
